body.title: Consolidate cc-admin scripts into lab.claudecode.api module + igor-admin CLI
body.result: api.py module + igor-admin CLI created; decision_manager.py:75 path fixed
body.description:
Collapse 9 scripts (cc_queue.py, decision_manager.py, session_manager.py, slate_manager.py, github_sync.py, docs_sync.py, palace_sync.py, review_manager.py, channel.py) into single lab/claudecode/api.py module exposing Python functions, plus igor-admin CLI (argparse) with subcommands: igor-admin ticket|session|decision|slate|palace|channel [verbs]. Each subcommand is one-line adapter calling api.<verb>() in-process. Benefits: (1) skills drop from 4-5 subprocess invocations/step to one, (2) shared DB connection eliminates per-invocation psycopg2 setup, (3) shared _db_url() eliminates 20 hardcoded DB URLs across SKILL.md files, (4) fixes broken subprocess path in decision_manager.py:75 — currently references 'claudecode/cc_queue.py' not 'lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py'; silent-except'd for weeks, breaking every /decided's Igor-flush. Scope: CLI consolidation, semantic parity with current behaviour (tests guard this), does NOT change what scripts do, does NOT touch cc_bridge.py or utility_closet_server.py (daemons), does NOT remove old .py entry points immediately — keep as 2-line shims for one release then delete. Files: all 9 scripts + every SKILL.md invoking them + decision_manager.py:75 broken path.

test_plan: Functional test per top-level subcommand round-tripping DB (igor-admin ticket list, session show, decision get). Integration test: old cc_queue.py still works as shim calling api. Regression: run full test suite confirming no behaviour change.
